1. About you (the person completing this form)
Full name
Date of birth
Address
If you want to keep your
address details confidential,
leave this part blank and
complete Confidential Contact
Details form C8.
Postcode
Phone Number
If you can, please give a
daytime phone number.
Email address
If you do not have a solicitor
put None (but see note 3 on
the Notice of Proceedings that
2. About your solicitor was served on you).
Full Name
Address
Postcode
Reference
Phone Number

Email address
If you want to keep your
address details confidential,
leave this question blank and
DX Number complete Confidential Contact
Details form C8.
3. Address to which letters and other papers should be sent
Address
Postcode
4. The application was received on
5. Do you oppose the application?
Yes
No
6. Did you receive a completed Supplemental Information Form
(form C1A) from the applicant with the papers served on you?
Yes - do you wish to comment on any of the statements made in that
form by the applicant?
Yes
No
No
7. Do you believe that the child(ren) named above have suffered or are
at risk of suffering any harm from any of the following:
• any form of domestic abuse
• violence within the household
• child abduction
• other conduct or behaviour
• by any person who –
(a)is or has been involved in caring for the child(ren); or
(b)lives with, or has contact, with the child(ren)?
Yes
No

metadata.title: Respond to a court application about a child: Form C7
metadata.description: Give information to the court about an application that involves a child and names you as respondent, including whether you agree or oppose the making of any order.
form_fields: Address to which letters and other papers should be sent
Assistance or special facilities at court
Believe that the child or children are at risk
Does not believe that the child or children are at risk
Does not intend to apply for an order
Intends to apply for an order
Name of respondent’s legal representative’s firm
Postcode to which letters and other papers should be sent
Statement of truth - facts stated are true
The full name(s) of the child(ren)
Will not use an interpreter at court
Will use an interpreter at court
